name: Oyster Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Water (enough to cover the oysters)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook oysters in their own juice with all above ingredients.
2. In a food processor, combine olives (stuffed with pimentos), drained oysters, bacon (with a little bacon drippings), and seasonings: garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder, and sweet relish.
3. Pulverize the mixture well in the food processor.
4. Chill the pate before serving on crackers.
Justin Wilson's "Gourmet and Gourmand Cookbook"
